Text: Hi (Supplier Name), Thank you for letting us know your items are not okay to stack. I have submitted the request to have this removed. Please note it may take 90 days to take effect. Thank you for your continued partnership, and if you have additional questions or concerns for us on this, please don’t hesitate to reach back out in this thread; otherwise, if we’ve addressed all your needs for the time being, I hope you have a great rest of your day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Best,

Hello [Supplier Name], We appreciate your patience while we reviewed this issue. I am happy to review more information on this with you today. I’m afraid that due to current limitations in our system, we are unable to cancel this PO, and as such it will remain in a [current PO status in PH] status. Please note there is no further action needed on this PO from your team. We are working to resolve this for future cases, though unfortunately do not have an ETA as to when this will be resolved. We do apologize for the inconvenience that this causes, and appreciate your understanding and continued partnership with Wayfair. If you have questions or concerns about a new order or PO, we encourage you to enter a new ticket to our team and we’re happy to help advise. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Best Regards,

Applicable SOPs: Escalating for Onshore Support (Tier 0 to Tier 1) SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hi Team, Thank you for submitting a support request. We have received your request and are currently reviewing this with the relevant internal team. We will provide an update within one business day at the latest, or sooner if we have additional information or a resolution. No further action is required from your side at this time. This ticket will remain open while we work on the next steps. We appreciate your patience and understanding. Kind regards, Wayfair Operations Team

Hello [supplier name], Thank you for confirming which warehouses needed to ship speed exclusions applied. As requested, I have updated these exclusions for the following warehouse IDs: (insert concatenated WHID list) This is a permanent change, and for subsequent POs should reflect your desired ship speed. Please note that if at any point these exclusions no longer apply, or if you need to update additional exclusions on other warehouses, please enter a ticket to our team directly using the following ticket path: Submit a Ticket > Dropship Order Fulfillment > Problem Fulfilling an Order > Change Ship Method on PO Due to Item Count/Size We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind regards, YOUR_NAME
